financial_metrics.title: Financial Metrics
financial_metrics.label: Average
bullets: The score is average because the document doesn't give enough detailed financial information.
Without specific numbers, it's hard to tell how well the company is really doing.

risk_intelligence.title: Risk Intelligence
risk_intelligence.label: Well Managed
bullets: The company has strong security measures to protect information, but cyber threats are still a big concern.
They were fined for not following rules, which shows they need to improve how they handle regulations.

esg.title: ESG Analysis
esg.label: Excellent
bullets: The company is doing a great job taking care of the environment and managing its operations responsibly.
They also treat people well and have strong leadership, which boosts their overall score.

capital_structure.title: Capital Structure
capital_structure.label: Moderate Risk
bullets: The company document lacks important details about how it manages its money and debts.
Without this information, it's hard to understand how financially stable the company is.

management_discussion.title: Management Discussion
management_discussion.label: Average
bullets: The company talks a lot about its goals and how it cares for its employees, but it doesn't share clear financial plans for the future.
While they are doing well in using renewable energy, the report could be more detailed in some areas to give a clearer picture.

strategy.title: Strategy Overview
strategy.label: Excellent
bullets: The company is doing well because it focuses on being responsible and fair, which is important for long-term success.
However, it could improve by clearly explaining how it plans to grow in new areas around the world.

investment_synthesis.title: Investment Synthesis
investment_synthesis.label: Good
bullets: HDFC Life is a good investment because it focuses on sustainable practices and community support, which can lead to long-term growth.
While there are some challenges, the company's strong market position and diverse insurance offerings make it a solid choice for investors.
